signals.raw: Key developments confirmed today (April 15, 2026):** US Vice President JD Vance and Iranian officials signal readiness for round two negotiations, potentially within days in Islamabad, after first talks ended without agreement—building on the fragile two-week ceasefire from April 8[4][5][6]. Trump warned of blockade consequences but hinted at deal proximity, stating the war is "very close to over,

signals.headline: Prediction market impact:** Progress toward talks could shift odds on prolonged ceasefire (currently ~50-60% implied fro
signals.raw: Prediction market impact:** Progress toward talks could shift odds on prolonged ceasefire (currently ~50-60% implied from context) or war end, though fragility tempers moves—medium confidence due to consistent reports across UN, Gulf News, Bloomberg but no signed deal[1][2][3][5][6]. Separate Israel-Lebanon direct talks add regional de-escalation signal[2][3][6].

signals.headline: Bitcoin Breaches $74,000-$75,000 and Ethereum Tops $2,300-$2,370 in Sudden Crypto Rally** | YES | HIGH
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Breaches $74,000-$75,000 and Ethereum Tops $2,300-$2,370 in Sudden Crypto Rally** | YES | HIGH  
Bitcoin surged 5% in 24 hours to above $74,000 (nearing $75,000 on some exchanges), reversing weekend losses tied to geopolitical concerns, while Ethereum jumped 7% past $2,300 resistance to $2,370—led by broad market rebound with total crypto value up 4% to $2.46 trillion[1][2][4][5][6].

signals.headline: CFTC Settles with Kcoin for $500,000** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
CFTC Settles with Kcoin for $500,000** | YES | MED  
On April 8, 2026, the CFTC reached a settlement with Kcoin for $500,000, cited as a factor in the recent Bitcoin pump above $74,000[6].

signals.headline: Ethereum Holdings and Staking Surge at Bitmine** | NO | LOW
signals.raw:
Ethereum Holdings and Staking Surge at Bitmine** | NO | LOW  
Bitmine reported 4.87M ETH holdings (4% of supply, valued at $10.7B) with 3.33M staked yielding $212M annualized revenue—no new confirmation, just updated data amid rally[4].
